Appearances:
Plaintiff Barbara Fedun is present.
Attorney Jak Marquez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Li Chang Rong and Wen Lin Pang are present.
Attorney Omar Calimbas representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-02-2012 remains on calendar.
